title: Senior Software Engineer - DRDO - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - DRDO - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DRDO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About DRDO:
DRDO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO!
